title: 3 Ancient Sites That Defy Understanding

segments.text: Some ancient monuments leave experts scratching their heads.
Their purpose remains a mystery to this day.
Some stones seem aligned with celestial events.
Were they built by advanced civilizations we don’t know?
These relics tell stories we can't fully grasp.
Follow for mysteries we still can't explain.

description: Ancient sites hold secrets from the past that confuse us. Follow for daily mysteries!
